Friendly Reminder

A Word from the Creator

This test was originally posted by Bilibili creator 蛆肉儿串儿 (UID417038183). It started as an attempt to convince a friend to quit drinking.

Since the creator's personality type is SHIT (The Hater), everyone got roasted equally — sorry about that!! But I'm an absolute goddess, so you'll definitely forgive me. If you're on Bilibili, feel free to follow me.

About this test: I couldn't perfectly balance entertainment and professionalism, so some personality descriptions might be vague or totally off (e.g., 'Loser' might not actually be a loser). If I offended you, I'm really sorry!!

Given limited time and energy, I just threw this together for fun — I'll keep improving it over time. The point is to have fun, so please don't use it for profit.

Retake Test Back to Home
